creator: shurd@FreeBSD.org
text:
When getting a buglist via https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/buglist.cgi the title is "Bugzilla is pondering your search" with page text of "Please stand by ...".

If I identify as IE, it works, and if I mask as either Firefox or IE, it also works.  This suggests that Bugzilla is detecting Opera and doing something that doesn't work.

Tested on latest Opera on Windows 7 and the FreeBSD 12.16 package on amd64.
